product_overview: QDMS is an integrated quality & operational management platform (documents, risks, CAPA, audits, KPI, suppliers, OHS, meetings, innovation and admin) providing REST API endpoints for CRUD and workflow actions. The product manual (QDMS Kullanım Kılavuzu) documents user flows for each module (see referenced pages below).
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and session management for web and API clients.
Enable full document lifecycle: create, review, approve, versioning and download with auditable actions.
Support core governance modules: users/roles, risk, audits, CAPA, suppliers, OHS and meetings with clear APIs.
Expose KPI and strategic planning features (objectives, goals, actions) and link KPIs to strategy.
Offer notifications and dashboard statistics for timely situational awareness.
Keep a clear admin area for user/role/department management and audit logs.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-up and sign-in with session/JWT management (manual: Login & Access, page 3). Backed by NextAuth routes and signup API.
user_flows: POST /api/signup with {email,password} -> Receive 200 User created -> POST /api/auth/signin with same credentials -> Receive 200 with session/JWT token
POST /api/auth/signin with invalid password -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Document Management
features.description: Create, list, view, update, delete, send for review and approve documents; supports folder/approval workflows and preview (manual: Document Management pages 5-6). Uses endpoints under /api/documents.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/documents with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {title,content,folderId} -> Receive 200 Document -> GET /api/documents with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Document[] -> GET /api/documents/{id} with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Document

POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/documents with Authorization: Bearer {token} and missing required fields -> Receive 400 Validation error -> GET /api/documents/{nonexistentId} with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Document Approval & Review
features.description: Send a document for review and approve it (manual: Document approval workflow page 5). Endpoints: /api/documents/[id]/review and /api/documents/[id]/approve.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/documents/{id}/review with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Document (status changed to 'in review') -> POST /api/documents/{id}/approve with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Document (status changed to 'published')

POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/documents/{id}/approve with Authorization: Bearer {token} for a document in invalid state -> Receive 400 Validation error or 409 Conflict

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin CRUD for users, list roles and departments (manual: Admin panel pages 24; Users & Roles sections). Uses /api/users, /api/roles and /api/departments.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/users with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {name,email,role,departmentId} -> Receive 200 User -> GET /api/users with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 User[]
POST /api/auth/signin with non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/users with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden

features.name: Risk Management
features.description: Record, list and view risk entries; risk rating auto-calculation described in manual (manual: Risk Assessment page 12). Endpoints: /api/risks.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/risks with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {title,category,department,probability,impact} -> Receive 200 Risk -> GET /api/risks with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Risk[] -> GET /api/risks/{id} with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Risk

POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/risks with Authorization: Bearer {token} and invalid probability/impact values -> Receive 400 Validation error -> GET /api/risks/{nonexistentId} with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Audit Management
features.description: Plan and record internal/external audits, findings and checklists (manual: Audit Management page 11). Endpoints: /api/audits.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/audits with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {type,scope,date,auditors,checklist} -> Receive 200 Audit -> GET /api/audits with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Audit[]
POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/audits with Authorization: Bearer {token} and missing required fields -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: KPI Management
features.description: Create KPIs, list them and add periodic measurements; KPI explanation and measurement flow in manual (manual: KPI pages 17). Endpoints: /api/kpis and /api/kpis/[id]/measurements.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/kpis with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {name,type,unit,target,period} -> Receive 200 KPI -> POST /api/kpis/{id}/measurements with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {value,date} -> Receive 200 Measurement -> GET /api/kpis with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 KPI[]

POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/kpis/{id}/measurements with Authorization: Bearer {token} and invalid measurement format -> Receive 400 Validation error -> GET /api/kpis/{nonexistentId}/measurements with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Strategic Planning
features.description: List objectives, goals and strategic actions; manual covers strategy periods, SWOT/PESTEL and KPI linking (manual: Strategic Planning pages 19-21). Endpoints: /api/objectives, /api/goals, /api/strategic-actions.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/objectives with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Objective[] -> GET /api/goals with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Goal[] -> GET /api/strategic-actions with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 StrategicAction[]
GET /api/objectives without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: CAPA Management
features.description: Create and list corrective/preventive actions with action items and lifecycle states (manual: CAPA page 8). Endpoint: /api/capas.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/capas with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {type,source,description,actions} -> Receive 200 CAPA -> GET /api/capas with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 CAPA[]
POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/capas with Authorization: Bearer {token} and missing action assignments -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Supplier Management
features.description: Register suppliers, list and evaluate them over time (manual: Supplier Management page 14). Endpoint: /api/suppliers.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/suppliers with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {name,taxId,contact,category,status} -> Receive 200 Supplier -> GET /api/suppliers with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Supplier[]
POST /api/suppliers with Authorization: Bearer {token} and invalid contact -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: OHS (Occupational Health & Safety) Management
features.description: Report and list accidents, near-misses and PPE tracking (manual: OHS pages 15). Endpoints: /api/ohs/accidents and related OHS endpoints.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/ohs/accidents with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {date,location,person,details,severity,actions} -> Receive 200 Accident -> GET /api/ohs/accidents with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Accident[]
POST /api/ohs/accidents with Authorization: Bearer {token} and missing date -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Meetings & Committees
features.description: Create/list meetings and committees, manage participants and agendas; meeting flow described in manual (manual: Meetings pages 9 & Committee pages 22). Endpoint: /api/meetings.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/meetings with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {type,date,time,location,participants,agenda} -> Receive 200 Meeting -> GET /api/meetings with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Meeting[]
POST /api/meetings with Authorization: Bearer {token} and date in past -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Innovation Management
features.description: Submit and list innovation ideas and track approved ideas as projects (manual: Innovation pages 23). Endpoints: /api/innovation/ideas.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/innovation/ideas with Authorization: Bearer {token} and body {title,description,category,expectedBenefit,resources} -> Receive 200 Idea -> GET /api/innovation/ideas with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Idea[]
POST /api/innovation/ideas with Authorization: Bearer {token} and missing title -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Dashboard & Notifications
features.description: Retrieve dashboard statistics and user notifications (manual: Dashboard pages 4 and Notifications center). Endpoints: /api/dashboard/stats and /api/notifications.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signin with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dashboard/stats with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 DashboardStats -> GET /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer {token} -> Receive 200 Notification[]
GET /api/dashboard/stats without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Strategic Planning

features.name: CAPA Management

features.name: Supplier Management

features.name: Dashboard & Notifications
features.description: Main dashboard stats, notification center, audit logs

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on API endpoints
Selective middleware protection - only 5 route patterns protected
known_limitations.impact: Other routes rely on per-route session checks
Inconsistent error response formats across endpoints
Breaking changes affect all clients immediately
